Why My Websites Always Look Next Level

✅ Make next level websites: https://nicolaipalmkvist.com/next-level or get the stock video I used: https://1.envato.market/chocolate Code to make it move: https://nicolaipalmkvist.com/make-it-... Why do some websites always catch your eye and stick in your mind? It’s not magic—it’s a combination of simple techniques I use in nearly every project. In this video, I’ll show you how I create stunning web designs using Wordpress Elementor and reveal one of my best tricks to make them truly stand out. Then, I’ll guide you step-by-step so you can do it yourself. I hope you’ll find value in this web design video and maybe even use it in your upcoming projects. There’s no doubt that this will be a major web design trend in 2025 and the years to come. And the best part? It’s incredibly easy to do! ✅ My #1 website builder: https://lifeonablock.com/elementor Enjoy! …...more

Summary
This video explores the power of full-height video backgrounds in web design. The creator demonstrates how to use these backgrounds to create visually engaging and unique websites, showcasing the process of adding a video background and building a design around it. The video also includes a sneak peek at the creator's favorite example, hinting at the potential for creative and fun web designs.

4K
Summary
This video explores the power of full-height video backgrounds in web design. The creator demonstrates how to use these backgrounds to create visually engaging and unique websites, showcasing the process of adding a video background and building a design around it. The video also includes a sneak peek at the creator's favorite example, hinting at the potential for creative and fun web designs.
